name: TimeTraveler
publisher: Bill's Game, Guangxi Xin Shang Mdt InfoTech
short_description: The unique color lead illustration hand-painted art style, quiet piano music, parallel world game playing method, press the time backward button, go back to the past, and cooperate with the previous self customs clearance, experience a journey and their own.
detailed_description:
A journey with yourself, when you are in trouble, and the only person who can help you is yourself, will you continue to move forward.
The unique color lead illustration hand-painted art style, quiet piano music, parallel world game playing method, press the time backward button, go back to the past, and cooperate with the previous self customs clearance, experience a journey and their own.
